subject: [PATCH v5 12/21] nfsd: apply the notify mask to the delegation when requested

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch modifies the NFS server to apply a notify mask to directory delegations when requested by the client. If the client enables notifications, the server sets the appropriate return mask in gddr_notification[0] to ensure lease acquisition sets the correct ignore mask. The server also checks if the client has set NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND and only offers notifications if it is enabled, as classic notifications require directory offset information which nfsd does not provide without this flag.
